headline: Is General Motors (GM) Still Attractive After Recent Pullback And Strong Multi Year Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether General Motors at around US$72.98 is still offering value or starting to look stretched, the recent mix of returns gives you plenty to think about. The stock is roughly flat over the last week at 0.2%, has seen a 7.3% decline over the past month and a 9.9% decline year to date, yet it still shows a 57.9% return over 1 year, 105.3% over 3 years and 31.2% over 5 years. Those moves have come alongside ongoing attention on General Motors as a key US auto name, with...
